title: Professional Relationships, Community Participation, and Consent · Application Repair Board
summary: A realistic professional relationships, community participation, and consent artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in reciprocal relationship practice plan and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and ev…
objectives: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.
Make a bounded, easy-to-decline request for information, feedback, introduction, or context with purpose and time expectations.
Contribute relevant help, documentation, testing, facilitation, learning notes, or community work within actual competence and norms.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map
steps.instruction:
debug case — Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The debug variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.

Inspect the Network Map trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map, keep Network Map connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Network Map, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Network Map precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: Automated messages ask strangers for referrals, ignore community norms and stop signals, and measure every relationship by immediate hiring access. The debug variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Map existing reciprocal relationships across work, study, community, identity-safe spaces, events, and weak ties without ranking human worth.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Network Map, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: People without industry contacts have no professional network.
